name: Classic Hummus and Pita Bread
headline: Dip-tastic! | 4 servings
description:
If you haven’t had the pleasure, allow us to introduce you to this creamy Middle Eastern dip! It’s traditionally made with chickpeas, tahini, garlic, and lemon juice, and tastes delicious with just about anything. We’ve paired it with fluffy pita bread for dipping, but you can also spread it on sandwiches, serve alongside veggies, or use it as the base for a sauce. 
"Nutrition values for 1 piece of White Pita Bread is as follows: Calories 220, Total Fat 1.5g, Sat. Fat 0g, Cholest. 0mg, Sodium 590mg, Total Carb. 38g, Fiber 1g, Sugar 1g, Protein 6 g. 
Nutrition values for 2 TBSP of Classic Hummus is as follows: Calories 90, Total Fat 8g, Sat. Fat 1g, Cholest. 0mg, Sodium 110mg, Total Carb. 3g, Fiber 1g, Sugar 1g, Protein 2 g. "
